description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”) being driven in conventional mode was involved in a collision on westbound 24th Street 
between Douglass Street and Hoffman Avenue. While the driver of the Cruise AV attempted to reverse into a parallel parking spot, the 
driver made contact with another parked vehicle’s front bumper, damaging the other vehicle’s front center bumper. There were no injuries 
and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
